Window was 4 Saturday-resets stale, making the budget gate blind and the HOLD loop self-consuming. change: ICT decision logging: log real commitment_score (None when the sovereign CommitmentDetector did not run, which is ALWAYS in the live ict.orchestrator path because the bridge is orphaned) instead of the constant size-multiplier 1.0; log the size multiplier under its own field commitment_size_mult; made validation_cycle + harvest_cycle None-safe.
rationale: RQ-REST-018 (verified REST-029): commitment_score was logged as a constant 1.0 in 100% of entries, conflating the size multiplier with the price-action quality score and biasing Oracle toward 'fully committed'. Honest None removes the misinformation. Isolation-safe (no new sovereign import; uses existing importlib hook). No change to entries/exits/sizing. Verified: imports OK, isolation test passes, no regression on test_ict_pipeline.py (17/17 of the passing subset unchanged).
deferred_followup: Wiring the real sovereign CommitmentDetector into the LIVE ict.orchestrator path is a separate ARCHITECTURAL decision (the ict-engine bridge that was meant to inject it is orphaned; the live scanner runs `python -m ict.orchestrator`). Requires Colin sign-off because it changes the live scanner entry point / resurrects the bridge.

change: Add run_daily idempotency guard: state['processed'] {trade_id: last_bar_date} skips a trade whose bar.date was already stepped this day (action SKIP_DUPLICATE; no state advance, no broker write; guards shadow AND live). No change to TradeState/step_trade/decide_exit/golden — replay-match parity preserved.
rationale: Pre-flip blocker: run_daily had no double-fire protection — a manual run colliding with the 08:30 launchd run double-stepped state (live evidence: shadow log trade 105 hold_count 1->3 on 2026-06-30). Live this would double-step the ATR trail / double-amend a real stop. Gates the SHADOW_MODE=False flip (~2026-07-28).
